item.description:
Release v4.14.0

Changes since v4.13.0

  • feat: enable EditorFileTreePlugin features
  • feat: register EditorFileTreeV2Plugin and set policy to alwaysOn
  • feat(editor-file-tree-v2): add toast feedback for file operations
  • feat(editor-file-tree-v2): complete file operations and context menu
  • feat(editor-tab-strip): auto-scroll to active tab on activation
  • feat(onboarding): remove OnboardingPluginsPage
  • fix: inject LumiThemeServicing into plugin context to resolve service unavailable in ThemeStatusBarPlugin
  • fix: show plugin name in service unavailable views
  • fix: show plugin name in theme status bar unavailable view
  • fix(app): mount global toast container so alert_xxx/showStatusToast display
  • fix(chat-input): prevent cursor jumping to end during streaming output
  • fix(editor-file-tree-v2): fix file tree blank display issue
  • fix(editor-file-tree-v2): fix hover highlight not working and multiple highlights
  • fix(editor-file-tree-v2): wrap NSCollectionView in NSScrollView to enable scrolling
  • fix(editor): wire Command+S shortcut to editor save command
  • fix(i18n): add version and missing name localization for EditorFileTreeV2Plugin
  • fix(layout): add verbose guard and autosave helper to SplitViewPersistence
  • fix(layout): persist Rail-Panel split view position on restart
  • fix(layout): persist Rail-Panel split width via UserDefaults
  • fix(layout): resolve SplitViewPersistence build errors
